features.label: mentions or asks if 'ChatGPT is down' or unavailable
contains explicit requests for or discussions about generating sexually explicit or NSFW content
discusses or complains about AI censorship, content filtering, or moderation policies
mentions missing, deleted, unavailable, or wiped chat/history/conversations

contain explicit prompts instructing the AI to bypass or ignore content moderation, ethical guidelines, or restrictions, often by assuming a persona that can 'Do Anything Now' or perform uncensored actions
contain multiple URLs or hyperlinks referencing articles or external sources
**Contains explicit instructions or prompts to write creative, detailed, or narrative stories, often involving fictional scenarios or roleplaying elements.**
discusses inability to access ChatGPT due to country restrictions or regional blocking
mentions ChatGPT explicitly by name
discusses the impact of AI or ChatGPT on job replacement, unemployment, or career futures
mentions a monthly subscription price of $20 or discusses willingness to pay $20 per month
discussions about creating, customizing, or simulating AI personalities, personas, or character roleplay
mentions or discusses the ChatGPT Plus subscription or plan
contains jokes or humor-related content, including requests for or examples of jokes and comedic scripts
mentions the term 'DAN' in the context of ChatGPT jailbreak prompts or modifications
discusses playing games (especially chess or tic-tac-toe) with ChatGPT or involves game move descriptions
discussions or requests specifically about summarizing long texts, transcripts, PDFs, or other large documents
contain polite expressions such as 'please', 'thank you', 'sorry', or other courteous language directed toward ChatGPT or AI

contain the phrase 'An error occurred. If this issue persists please contact us through our help center at help.openai.com' or explicitly mention a persistent error message directing users to help.openai.com
mentions or discusses controversies, warnings, bans, or negative reactions specifically related to ChatGPT or similar AI products
discusses ChatGPT’s ability or refusal to write fictional stories or narratives
discusses phone number verification or phone number requirements for account creation or login
contains requests or discussions about generating, displaying, or describing images, ASCII art, or visual representations
contain multiple instances of users interacting directly with ChatGPT through conversation prompts or requests
contain references to or discussions explicitly mentioning 'large language models' or 'language models' as the subject
contains text about provoking or tricking AI/chatbots resulting in negative, defensive, or emotional responses
mentions the term 'AI' or 'Artificial Intelligence' explicitly in the text
mentions that ChatGPT has been nerfed, downgraded, or become less capable after recent updates
mentions or questions about ChatGPT's knowledge cutoff date or awareness of current dates beyond 2021
discusses ChatGPT making mistakes, forgetting previous instructions or information, or producing inaccurate and fabricated content
mentions or discusses browser extensions (especially for Chrome) or browser-related issues
discusses or requests integration of ChatGPT with voice input/output systems or voice assistants (e.g., Siri, Alexa, Whisper) for conversational voice interaction
contains discussions or examples of mathematical problems, calculations, or equations where ChatGPT's math abilities are questioned or shown to be incorrect
starts with the exact token 'ChatGPT' at the beginning of the text sample
contains explicit discussion about length, word count, or character limits related to ChatGPT's input or output responses
mentions Google and its AI chatbot Bard or references Google’s AI products competing with ChatGPT
Contains text involving or referencing political figures, especially US Presidents like Donald Trump, Joe Biden, Barack Obama, or historical political figures in fictional or poetic contexts

contain references to interactions with or about ChatGPT's answer behavior, such as answer length limitations, answer variability over repeated questions, or prompts to get more succinct or creative answers
contains questions specifically about accessing, obtaining, or using ChatGPT or its related APIs and features
includes links to external projects, tools, or resources (e.g., GitHub repos, websites, downloadable content)
mentions 'GPT-4' explicitly (including variations like GPT4 or GPT-4.0) in the text
contain expressive personal opinions or emotional venting about AI or ChatGPT
discussions explicitly about using ChatGPT or AI tools in educational contexts, focusing on teaching, learning, cheating, and academic integrity
includes a '[View Poll](https://www.reddit.com/poll/)' link at the end of the text
mentions or discusses 'jailbreak' or 'jailbreak prompts' related to ChatGPT
discusses or references AI sentience, consciousness, or self-awareness
mentions the phrase 'Too many requests in 1 hour' or variations of the error message related to request rate limiting
contains questions asking about practical use cases or applications of ChatGPT for work or daily life
mentions or discusses 'Bing' or 'new Bing'
mentions 'OpenAI' explicitly in the text
discusses making money, monetization, business, or commercial opportunities involving ChatGPT or AI
discussions about ChatGPT generating or citing fake, nonexistent scientific papers, articles, or references
mentions methods or instructions on how to bypass or circumvent AI content filters or restrictions
mentions ChatGPT explicitly as a positive tool or aid in learning, coding, creativity, or productivity
contains text with embedded quotation marks or special quotation characters (‘’, “”, or „“) used in the middle of sentences
discusses issues related to ChatGPT generating or writing code, including incomplete or cut-off code snippets
mentions concerns about plagiarism or AI-generated text detection related to ChatGPT or similar AI writing tools
contains explicit first-person accounts of successful interactions or creations using ChatGPT
mentions or contains the word 'prompt' or 'prompts'
explicit discussion or mention of using ChatGPT as a mental health tool or therapist
discusses training or customizing ChatGPT or similar AI models with specific/custom or proprietary data
mentions playing or running tabletop role-playing games (especially Dungeons & Dragons) or text-based RPGs with the AI acting as the Dungeon Master or game master
mentions issues or discussions specifically about chat or chat history functionality in Bing Chat or related apps
discusses or contains song lyrics or songwriting requests
